params.name: Bloodthirsty Scroll
params.description: Bloodthirsty Spell was used by the Orc Shamans and can inflict fanaticism on an allied unit, boosting attack and movement speed for 20 seconds.
params.ss1:
Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail ATK +1
Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
